gemDescription: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Increases and reductions to cast speed also apply to projectile speed on supported Spell Skills

gemDescription: Supports skills which create Minions, causing those Minions to be unable to deal or take Damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Minions cannot deal damage
Supported Minions cannot take damage

gemDescription: Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit. Supported Skills Gain a portion of their Life cost as extra Physical Damage.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Converts part of Mana cost into Life cost
Supported Skills gain a portion of Life cost as extra Physical Damage

gemDescription: Supports Melee Strike skills, causing them to steal a Modifier from Rare monsters they kill for a lengthy duration, while being unable to damage enemies not on low Life. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Melee Strike skills steal a modifier from Rare monsters they kill
Cannot damage enemies that are not on low Life

gemDescription: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a Fissure, at the cost of damage and Area of Effect.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Walls from supported skills are created along a fissure
Supported Skills deal less damage and have reduced Area of Effect

gemDescription: Supports skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration or when they take further damage exceeding their maximum Life. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Persistent Minions fight on briefly after being fatally wounded
These Minions die after a short duration or when further damage exceeds max Life
They gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed when entering this state

gemDescription: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger. Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills permanently increases the Physical Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Skills inflict stronger Armour Break
Fully broken Armour permanently increases Physical Damage taken (up to a cap)

gemDescription: Supports Warcries, causing them to inflict massive amounts of Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect, at the cost of your Life.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Warcries inflict massive Corrupted Blood in area
Costs Life to use

gemDescription: Supports Skills which can expend Combo. On expending Combo with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain Power Charges based on the amount of Combo expended.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Chance to gain Power Charges when expending Combo with Supported Skills
Chance scales with amount of Combo expended

gemDescription: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create Hazardous areas which explode when Enemies enter them, Cursing Enemies and dealing Chaos Damage based on your Intelligence.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Creates hazardous areas that explode on enemy entry
Curses enemies and deals Chaos Damage based on Intelligence

gemDescription: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load multiple extra bolts. Supported Skills cannot reload normally, instead loading bolts when you Dodge.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Loads multiple extra bolts for Crossbow Ammunition skills
Cannot reload normally; loading happens on Dodge

gemDescription: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting a chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill with Supported Skill.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on killing blow with Supported Skill

gemDescription: Supports Melee Attacks which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create many additional fissures at the cost of damage, attack speed, and area of effect.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Creates many additional fissures with Melee Attacks
Reduces damage, attack speed, and area of effect

gemDescription: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional projectiles in a circle, resetting when they do.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Projectile Spells have increasing chance to fire many extra projectiles in a circle
Chance resets when extra projectiles are fired

gemDescription: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage, Area of Effect, and Projectile Speed randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Triggered Skills have random changes to Damage, AoE, and Projectile Speed
Triggered Skills recover a random portion of their cost

gemDescription: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is Recouped by you as Life.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Minions take part of the Hit Damage you would have taken
Minions have lower max Life
You recoup a percentage of that damage as Life

gemDescription: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life. Totems created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing Physical damage based on their Life.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Totems have increased Life
Totems explode on death, dealing Physical Damage based on their Life

gemDescription: Supports Skills that cause Damaging Hits. Hits from Supported Skills cannot kill Enemies.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Damaging Hits from supported Skills cannot kill enemies

gemDescription: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Increases level of supported Skill
Increases Quality of supported Skill
Reduces cost and reservation

gemDescription: Supports Curse Skills. Enemies Cursed by Supported Skills are Pacified for the final portion of the Supported Curse's duration.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Cursed enemies are Pacified during final part of curse duration

gemDescription: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Adds extra Chaos damage to supported Damaging Hits

gemDescription: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Adds extra Chaos damage to supported Damaging Hits
Chaos damage contributes to Shock

gemDescription: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Freeze Buildup.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Adds extra Chaos damage to supported Damaging Hits
Chaos damage contributes to Freeze Buildup

gemDescription: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Adds extra Chaos damage to supported Damaging Hits
Chaos damage breaks Armour

gemDescription: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Hits treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted

gemDescription: Supports Attack skills, granting them Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of Attack Speed depending on Weapon Set they are used in. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Grants Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or vice versa depending on weapon set

gemDescription: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Grants many additional levels if no other supports are used

gemDescription: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Grants many additional levels if exactly one other support is used

gemDescription: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Grants many additional levels if exactly two other supports are used

gemDescription: Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Reduces Glory cost for supported Banner Skills

gemDescription: Supports Curse Skills, causing those Curses to ignore the usual Curse Limit, but be reflected back to you.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.

gemDescription: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Poison from supported Skills deals damage faster based on your Rage

gemDescription: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo twice, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay, but Supported Skills are given a short Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling skills, Remote skills, skills which already have a Cooldown, or skills which are Triggered.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Spells echo twice after a short delay
Supported Skills gain a short Cooldown
Cannot support Channelling, Remote, existing Cooldown or Triggered skills

gemDescription: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported Attack Skills only usable after moving a certain distance
Bifurcates Critical Hit Chance

gemDescription: Supports Commandable Minions causing you and the Supported Minion to gain Unholy Might when you Command them.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: You and commanded Minion gain Unholy Might when commanded

gemDescription: Supports Offering Skills, causing Spells that affect an area around you or a target location to also affect the area around Supported Offerings.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Area Spells also affect area around Supported Offerings

gemDescription: Supports Persistent Minion Skills, granting a chance when Supported Minions die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Chance to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier when supported Minions die

gemDescription: Supports any Skill that can deal Damage, causing it to deal more Damage per different Command Skill used.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Deals more damage per different Command Skill used

gemDescription: Supports Fire Spell Skills. You have a chance to gain Flame Archon when Igniting with Supported Skills.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Chance to gain Flame Archon when igniting with supported Fire Spells

gemDescription: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Damage increases with number of Poisons on target

gemDescription: Supports skills that leap into the air, causing corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported skills trigger Fiery Reclamation on landing
Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to 6% of the corpse's maximum Life
Explosion radius is 1.5 metres
Detonates corpses in a radius of 3.5 metres

gemDescription: Supports skills which hit enemies, causing their Mana Leech to recover based on elemental damage instead of physical damage.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Mana Leech from supported skills recovers based on elemental damage types instead of physical damage

gemDescription: Supports skills that have a benefit for perfectly timing their use; on successfully executing Perfect Timing with a supported skill you gain Tasalio's Rhythm.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.

Tasalio's Rhythm stacks up to 5 times
Supported skills have a 100% longer Perfect Timing window

gemDescription: Supports buff skills that reserve Spirit; Spirit costs from supported skills are converted to reserve a percentage of your Life.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.

gemDescription: Supports attacks by creating bells that unleash shockwaves; attack damage is greatly reduced but shockwaves persist.

gemDescription: Supports skills that generate Remnants; picking up Remnants from supported skills grants Khatal's Rejuvenation.

effects: Supported skills generate Remnants

gemDescription: Supports shapeshifting skills; when shapeshifting with supported skills you gain a buff that stores damage taken and grants Guard and Rage when it expires.

gemDescription: Supports spells you cast yourself that hit enemies; when you critically strike with a supported spell, Atziri's Storm is triggered at the nearest enemy location.

effects: On critical hit with supported spells, triggers Atziri's Storm at the nearest enemy location

gemDescription: Supports Offering skills. Supported skills sacrifice a portion of your Life and create offering spikes that grant power and regeneration while they persist.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported skills sacrifice 25% of Life on use
Supported skills create offering spikes
While offering spikes persist, you gain a Power Charge every 4 seconds
When offering spikes die, you regenerate 5% of Life and Mana per second for as long as the offering existed

gemDescription: Supports spells that create storms; increases their limit and travel speed but reduces their area and damage.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Storms from supported skills originate at you and travel towards your target
Supported skills have +1 to maximum storms limit
Supported skills have 60% increased storm travel speed

Supported skills deal 35% less damage

gemDescription: Supports curse skills, causing them to create cursed ground that curses enemies and gathers power before erupting into a column of light.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
effects: Supported curse skills create cursed ground that curses enemies within
Cursed ground gathers power before erupting into a column of light after a delay
You may have up to 2 areas of cursed ground

gemDescription: Supports any skill that can deal damage. Lightning damage from supported skills can inflict Electrocute but cannot inflict Shock; enemies slain while electrocuted by supported skills explode, dealing a portion of their maximum Life as lightning damage.

gemDescription: Supports attacks and warcries; freezing an enemy with supported skills infuses you and nearby allies with extra cold damage based on your current Rage.

gemDescription: Supports skills with cooldowns; supported skills have 100% increased cooldown recovery rate but you lose a quarter of your Life, Mana and Energy Shield when using them.
description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple copies of the same Support Gem socketed at the same time.
